title: Vitoria consulta Vitor (MVP — assimétrico, sem arbiter)

userStories.title: Migration AgentConsultation com RLS e CHECK terminal-imutável
userStories.description: Criar supabase/migrations/20260601a_agent_consultation.sql conforme §7.1: tabela AgentConsultation, indexes, RLS (read=can_view_project, insert=manager+can_lead, update só permitido em status='in-progress'), trigger updatedAt, CHECK constraint forçando response fields populados quando status='completed'. Rodar via psql $DIRECT_URL.
acceptanceCriteria: Tabela AgentConsultation existe com RLS habilitada
Indexes em (contextType, contextId), (projectId, createdAt), partial in-progress

verifiable.command_or_query: psql "$DIRECT_URL" -tAc "SELECT count(*) FROM pg_tables WHERE tablename='AgentConsultation';"
psql "$DIRECT_URL" -tAc "SELECT count(*) FROM pg_policies WHERE tablename='AgentConsultation';"

userStories.title: Regenerar database.types.ts + interface ConsultantProfile em AgentDefinition + popular em Vitor
userStories.description: Atualizar database.types.ts pra incluir AgentConsultation. Em src/lib/agent/types.ts adicionar interface ConsultantProfile (domain, must, cant, recommendedModel?, examples?) + campo opcional consultantProfile?: ConsultantProfile em AgentDefinition. Em src/lib/agent/agents/vitor/index.ts adicionar consultantProfile com domain='produto/discovery/persona', must (focar persona/dor/journey/AC criticality), cant (não falar capacity/sprint/squad/FP), recommendedModel='haiku', 2 examples realistas.

userStories.title: Zod schemas ConsultationResponse e CreateConsultationInput
userStories.description: Criar src/lib/agent/consultation/schemas.ts com ConsultationResponse (position min 20 max 500, rationale min 50 max 2000, confidence 0-1) usado em generateObject + CreateConsultationInput (contextType enum, contextId? uuid, projectId, consultedAgent enum ['vitor'], topic min 20 max 300, contextPrdRefs array min 1, yourCurrentThinking min 20 max 1000). Type exports.
acceptanceCriteria: Exporta ConsultationResponse e CreateConsultationInput como Zod schemas

userStories.title: invokeConsultation + buildConsultantPrompt (LLM call isolated, sem tools)
userStories.description: src/lib/agent/consultation/prompt.ts: fn buildConsultantPrompt(consultantProfile, topic, prdContext, yourCurrentThinking) que monta system prompt rigoroso ('você é Vitor em modo consultor. Foque PRODUTO. Não fale capacity. Output JSON.') + user prompt com topic + PRD content. src/lib/agent/consultation/invoke.ts: fn invokeConsultation que carrega PRDs (getPrdById), chama generateObject com schema ConsultationResponse, modelo claude-haiku-4-5 (D6), retorna {position, rationale, confidence, tokensUsed, costUsd, model}. SEM tools — pure opinion.
acceptanceCriteria: Arquivos prompt.ts e invoke.ts em src/lib/agent/consultation/ existem
Sem chamada a runAgent ou tools (só generateObject puro)

verifiable.command_or_query: test -f src/lib/agent/consultation/prompt.ts && test -f src/lib/agent/consultation/invoke.ts && echo ok

userStories.title: DAL agent-consultation (6 fns: create/get/complete/fail/listByContext/listInProgress)
userStories.description: src/lib/dal/agent-consultation.ts com createConsultation (insere status='in-progress'), getConsultation (retorna row), completeConsultation (update status='completed' + response fields), failConsultation (status='error' + errorMessage), listByContext (audit page), listInProgress (polling do UI da Vitoria). Tudo respeitando RLS, sem service_role bypass.

userStories.title: Tool consult_vitor no toolset da Vitoria + integração no buildTools
userStories.description: src/lib/agent/agents/vitoria/tools/consult-vitor.ts: AI SDK tool com inputSchema (topic 20-300, contextPrdRefs min 1, yourCurrentThinking 20-1000). Execute: cost cap pre-check (estimar tokens, abort se >$0.10), createConsultation → invokeConsultation('vitor', ...) → completeConsultation → return {consultationId, position, rationale, confidence}. Em vitoria/index.ts: adicionar consult_vitor ao return de buildTools quando projectId presente. Description rigorosa: USAR quando dúvida produto/AC criticality, NÃO USAR pra capacity/sprint/squad.
acceptanceCriteria: Tool tem inputSchema Zod + execute function

userStories.title: API routes (POST create async + GET single + GET list + POST abort) + job worker
userStories.description: Routes em src/app/api/consultations/: route.ts (POST cria + dispara job 202+jobId, GET list por ?projectId&status&contextType&contextId), [id]/route.ts (GET hidrata), [id]/abort/route.ts (POST status=aborted). Validation Zod. Auth proxy.ts. Job worker em src/lib/jobs/consultation-job.ts (invoca runConsultation helper = invokeConsultation + completeConsultation).
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/consultations retorna 202 com consultationId e jobId

userStories.title: UI ConsultationSheet (ResponsiveSheet + pulse + polling auto-open)
userStories.description: src/components/agent/consultation/consultation-sheet.tsx: ResponsiveSheet size='md' (D7+D8). Header com PulseDot + título. Body: 3 seções (Tópico, Raciocínio Vitoria, Resposta Vitor com spinner→card). Cost meter visível. Footer: [Ver detalhes][Fechar] ou [Abortar]. Polling setInterval 2s GET /api/consultations/:id até status terminal. pulse-dot.tsx: CSS keyframe respeita motion-reduce. Hook src/hooks/use-in-progress-consultations.ts polla list endpoint, Vitoria's chat usa pra auto-open sheet.
acceptanceCriteria: Arquivo consultation-sheet.tsx existe e usa ResponsiveSheet
Arquivo pulse-dot.tsx existe e respeita motion-reduce
